case_title: CCSF-OFFICE OF THE TREASURER-TAX COLLECTOR (BDR) VS. EFRAM BRYANT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-04-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY K. DAVID L. DONAHUE, JR., SENIOR COLLECTIONS OFFICER. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF-OFFICE OF THE TREASURER-TAX COLLECTOR (BDR) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRYANT, EFRAM $3,666.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.97 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,711.97 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
